title: quercus gracilis
intro: Quercus gracilis, also known as the Japanese evergreen oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Quercus gracilis has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, due to its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Quercus gracilis can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
